description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Movicol, a medicine for constipation relief, produced by Acino Switzerland. The box is predominantly white with a wave-like blue and green graphic and orange accent lines, and features both English and Arabic text. The front displays the product name, purpose, and branding, while the sides provide detailed dosage instructions, ingredients, and manufacturer information. The packaging indicates that it contains 20 sachets of powder for oral solution. The box is sealed and appears sturdy, suitable for storage and transport in pharmacies or healthcare settings. The Acino logo, a stylized set of colored lines, is visible on the front and side panels.
description: A white rectangular box of Movicol medicine with blue, green, and orange graphics, labeled in English and Arabic, containing 20 sachets for oral solution.
description_view_0: Front view showing Arabic product name, Acino logo, and decorative wave graphics.
description_view_1: Side view with detailed ingredients, manufacturer, and storage information in English and Arabic.
description_view_2: Front/top view with English product name, usage, and prominent branding and graphics.
description_view_3: Side view with dosage instructions and usage guidelines in English.
attribute_label_text: موفيكول لعلاج الإمساك كيس 13.8 جم مستحضر لإعداد محلول للاستخدام عن طريق الفم. acino Switzerland كيس 20 Movicol Effective relief from constipation Powder for oral solution 20 sachets acino Switzerland Each sachet contains: Macrogol 3350 13.125g Sodium chloride 350.7mg Sodium bicarbonate 178.5mg Potassium chloride 46.6mg On reconstitution in 125 ml of water each sachet provides: Sodium 65mmol/l Chloride 53.4mmol/l Potassium 5.4mmol/l Bicarbonate 17mmol/l Store below 30°C. Reconstituted solution should be consumed within 6 hours. Manufactured by: Acino Pharma AG, Miesbach, Germany for: Acino International AG, Muenchensteinerstrasse 47, 4052 Basel, Switzerland. For oral use. Dosage: Unless prescribed, is not recommended for children under 12 years of age. Adults, adolescents and elderly: 1-3 times daily. Each sachet is dissolved in 125 ml (1/4 pint) of water. Read the package leaflet before use.
attribute_brand_logo: stylized colored lines in orange, purple, and red forming a wave-like emblem
